remember: Students will be able to recall the key steps involved in the management of sporting events.
Students will be able to recall the roles and responsibilities of different personnel involved in the management of sporting events.
Students will be able to recall the importance of planning, organization, and control in the management of sporting events.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of event management and its relevance in the context of sporting events.
Students will be able to understand the factors that influence the management of sporting events.
Students will be able to understand the role of technology in the management of sporting events.
apply: Students will be able to apply the principles of event management to plan and organize a sporting event.
Students will be able to apply the skills of communication and teamwork to manage a sporting event.
Students will be able to apply the knowledge of risk management to identify and mitigate potential hazards in a sporting event.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the strengths and weaknesses of different event management models.
Students will be able to analyze the impact of environmental and social factors on the management of sporting events.
Students will be able to analyze the role of sponsorship and marketing in the management of sporting events.

ncert_objectives: To understand the concept of event management and its application in the context of sporting events.
To identify the key steps involved in the planning, organization, and control of sporting events.
To describe the roles and responsibilities of different personnel involved in the management of sporting events.
board_exam_objectives: To plan and organize a sporting event, applying the principles of event management.
To demonstrate the skills of communication and teamwork in the management of a sporting event.
To identify and mitigate potential hazards in a sporting event, applying the knowledge of risk management.
